title: All-in-One PHP-FPM + Nginx/Apache Containers
summary: In a previous post, Docker PHP/PHP-FPM Configuration via Environment Variables, I described how to use environment variables to configure PHP FPM and CLI. With my method you can override one of over 650 PHP INI settings. More INI settings are but a PR away! title: PHP Modules Toggled via Environment Variables
summary: In my previous post, Docker PHP/PHP-FPM Configuration via Environment Variables I introduced my new PHP image that uses environment variables to configure its INI settings. title: Setting Up a Static Site with Hugo and Push to Deploy
summary: For several years this blog was generated using the PHP static site generator Sculpin. I switched to Grav before deciding it was not for me.
